detail: Before Office repair, the full L-mode semantic suite and standard PowerShell Automation both failed document operations with Excel's misleading no-memory-or-disk-space message, despite ample host capacity. After repair and cold reboot, PowerShell Workbooks.Add succeeds, but the zero-process raw L/S controls and a standalone high-level Rust IDispatch reproduction still return DISP_E_EXCEPTION (0x80020009) with EXCEPINFO SCODE 0x800A03EC before any semantic write. Every owned process exited naturally. The remaining blocker is the direct IDispatch binding differential.
Calendar conversion, application/workbook/worksheet/range wrappers, permissive array-shape coercion, and a stable public API remain outside Prompt 06.
